slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top: bold red #E63946 stripe full width + COMPACT white text '코피 긴급 가이드'. Top-right below stripe: 소아과언니 white Pretendard SemiBold small, no quotes. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '고개 뒤로 젖히면' white bold, '더 위험합니다' bright red #E63946. Small white subtitle: 올바른 응급처치법 · AAP 가이드라인 기준. LARGE prominent line illustration child with nosebleed tilting head back with red X mark, white outline on dark background, center-right area. Bottom-left small gray: PARENTING NOTE · 011. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes. Top-left red rounded label: 흔한 오해 ⚠️. Headline COMPACT: '코피나면 고개를' white, '뒤로 젖힌다?' red #E63946. Center: LARGE illustration showing traditional wrong method with red prohibition symbol overlay, line art style white and red. Below illustration: dark card #1A2B3C rounded, COMPACT white text: 이것은 잘못된 응급처치법입니다. AAP 가이드라인에서도 권장하지 않습니다. Bottom thin red divider. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes. Top-left red rounded label: 절대 하지 마세요 ❌. Three rows stacked vertically with GENEROUS spacing: Row 1 - SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION ICON lungs left with red ❌ overlay + COMPACT white text right '기도로 피 흡인 · 질식 위험'. Row 2 - SMALL ICON stomach left with red ❌ overlay + COMPACT white text right '삼킨 피가 위장 자극 · 구토 유발'. Row 3 - SMALL ICON throat left with red ❌ overlay + COMPACT white text right '목 뒤로 넘어가는 피'. Red outlined box around all three rows with comfortable padding. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes. Top-left mint #2EC4B6 rounded label: 올바른 자세 ✓. Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes. Top-left mint rounded label: 핵심 행동 ✓. Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes. Top-left mint rounded label: 안심하세요 ✓.
